summary.lv: DiscoverCars.com — globāls auto nomas rezervāciju portāls — meklē vecāko React Native mobilo inženieri, kas izstrādās iOS un Android lietotnes (React Native, TypeScript, native Swift/Kotlin) hibrīda režīmā Rīgā.
summary.en: DiscoverCars.com — a global car-rental marketplace — is hiring a Senior React Native Mobile Engineer to build its iOS and Android apps (React Native, TypeScript, native Swift/Kotlin) in hybrid mode in Riga.
